<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a React + Vite + TypeScript + Ant Design frontend for a nursery management system. Focus on secure authentication (JWT), role-based access (admin, parent, caregiver), and UI for registration, login, and assigning children to groups. Use axios for API calls. Do not hardcode secrets. Use Ant Design components for all UI.
